name: CMP_ASG_SALARY_RATE_COMPTS_V
query: SELECT prc.business_group_id, prc.legislative_data_group_id, prc.person_id, prc.work_term_id, csa.assignment_id, prc.assignment_type, csa.salary_id, csa.date_from, csa.date_to, csa.salary_basis_id, csb.name AS salary_basis_name, rdf.rate_definition_id, prc.rate_display_sequence, rdf.name AS rate_name, prc.rate_factor, prc.rate_amount, rdf.fte_flag, prc.rate_annual_amount, prc.rate_annual_ft_amount, rdf.default_rtn_currency AS rate_currency_code, rdf.default_rtn_periodicity AS rate_frequency_code, hlk.meaning AS rate_frequency_name, rdf.legislation_code AS legislation_code, rdf.return_precision AS rate_scale, rdf.return_rounding AS rate_rounding_code, rdf.amount_enterable AS rate_enterable, rdf.factor_enterable AS rate_factor_enterable, rdf.base_salary_flag AS rate_base_salary_flag, rdf.overall_salary_flag AS rate_overall_salary_flag, prc.object_version_number, prc.created_by, prc.creation_date, prc.last_update_date, prc.last_update_login, prc.last_updated_by FROM cmp_salary_pay_components prc, pay_rate_definitions_f_vl rdf, cmp_salary csa, hcm_lookups hlk, cmp_salary_bases csb WHERE prc.pay_rate_definition_id = rdf.rate_definition_id AND csa.salary_id = prc.salary_id AND csa.salary_basis_id = csb.salary_basis_id AND hlk.lookup_type (+) = 'PAY_TMPLT_ET_TIME_DEFINITION' AND hlk.lookup_code (+) = rdf.default_rtn_periodicity AND csa.date_from BETWEEN rdf.effective_start_date AND rdf.effective_end_date ORDER BY csa.assignment_id, csa.salary_id , prc.rate_display_sequence
